response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows via MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated work on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and open-source developer tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Limited indication of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
